title: Smart Commerce Platform
description: AI-powered multivendor e-commerce with natural-language product search, an intelligent price-negotiation agent, and personalized recommendations.

title: Resume Optimizer SaaS
description: AI resume-tailoring system using LLM agents — improves ATS matching with keyword optimization and prompt engineering. Cut manual resume effort by 70%.

title: Interview Practice Platform
description: AI interview simulator that generates questions from a resume and job description, and gives adaptive feedback across realistic scenarios.

title: Social Networking App
description: Real-time social platform with messaging, notifications, and dynamic updates built on WebSockets.

title: LLM Document Q&A
description: Document question-answering system built at Eqaim using layered prompt pipelines over large document corpora.

title: AI Content Moderation
description: Content-moderation service detecting unsafe media — production system serving concurrent users.
